title: Anthropic 为 Claude 模型引入 Web 搜索功能
author: Daniel Dominguez
content:
Anthropic has announced the addition of web search capabilities to its Claude models, available via the Anthropic API. This update enables Claude to access current information from the web, allowing developers to create applications and AI agents that provide up-to-date insights.

The new feature works by enabling Claude to generate targeted search queries when up-to-date information is needed. Claude analyzes the results, extracts relevant information, and provides a comprehensive response with citations to source materials. In some cases, Claude can perform iterative searches, refining queries based on previous results to generate more detailed answers. Developers can control the number of searches using the max_uses parameter.

The web search functionality is built to support a wide range of applications across different industries. In financial services, it can be used to analyze real-time stock prices, market trends, and regulatory updates. For legal research, it provides access to recent court decisions, changes in regulations, and legal news. Developers can use it to reference up-to-date API documentation, GitHub releases, and technology updates. In productivity-focused use cases, it enables the integration of the latest company reports, competitive intelligence, and industry research.

To ensure trust and control, every web-sourced response includes citations. Organizations can also manage access to web search through admin settings, such as allowing or blocking specific domains and controlling web search usage at the organization level.

The web search feature is now available in Claude Code, enabling developers to access current information during workflows, such as troubleshooting issues or working with new frameworks.

Spencer Chan, Head of Poe Product at Quora commented:

Anthropic’s web search tool is a welcome addition to the Poe platform, it is cost-effective and delivers search results with impressive speed, benefiting users who need real-time information while using Claude models on Poe.

Dennis Xu, Co-founder of Adaptive.ai, added: 

Anthropic’s web search delivers consistently thorough results that have outperformed other tools we’ve tested. The depth and accuracy of Claude’s responses and its ability to function as a research agent will make a significant difference in how we enable customers to build web-enabled products.

Web search is available for Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Claude 3.5 Haiku. Developers can enable the feature in their API requests and explore the documentation for more details.

The introduction of web search aligns with a broader trend among AI platforms to incorporate real-time data capabilities. xAI's Grok, for instance, uses web search to generate more informed responses. Similarly, other platforms have integrated live search to improve information accuracy and relevance. Microsoft’s Copilot connects with Bing Search, allowing users to access up-to-date content. Perplexity AI offers a conversational interface that pulls from the web with source citations, delivering context-rich answers. Google’s Gemini integrates with Google Search to provide timely insights on current events, news, and technical topics. These capabilities are increasingly valuable for use cases such as research, customer support, and informed decision-making.
aiSummary: Anthropic Claude 模型新增 Web 搜索功能，助力开发者构建实时信息驱动的 AI 应用。
oneSentenceSummary: Anthropic Claude 模型新增 Web 搜索功能，助力开发者构建实时信息驱动的 AI 应用。
summary: Anthropic 为其 Claude 模型添加 Web 搜索功能，通过 Anthropic API 提供实时信息访问能力，增强信息检索。该功能使 Claude 能够生成有针对性的搜索查询，迭代优化搜索结果，并提供包含源材料引用的全面响应。Web 搜索功能支持跨不同行业的广泛应用，如金融服务、法律研究等。Poe 平台用户称赞其成本效益和速度优势，Adaptive.ai 则强调其结果的彻底性和准确性。为了确保信任和控制，每个 Web 来源的响应都包含引用。Web 搜索适用于 Claude 3.5 Sonnet、Claude 3.5 Haiku 等模型。这一功能的引入符合 AI 平台整合实时数据能力的行业趋势。

mainPoints.point: Claude 模型现已集成 Web 搜索功能，可访问最新信息
mainPoints.explanation: 通过 Anthropic API，开发者可利用 Claude 访问实时网络数据，构建更智能、信息更全面的 AI 应用。

mainPoints.point: Web 搜索功能支持多种行业应用，提高信息获取效率
mainPoints.explanation: 在金融、法律、技术等领域，Claude 可快速检索和分析最新信息，辅助决策和研究。

mainPoints.point: Anthropic 通过引用和管理工具，致力于构建可信赖的 Web 搜索体验，并顺应 AI 平台整合实时数据能力的行业趋势。
mainPoints.explanation: 每个 Web 来源的响应都包含引用，组织可以通过管理设置控制 Web 搜索的使用。该功能与 AI 平台整合实时数据能力的行业趋势相契合。

keyQuotes: Anthropic 的 Web 搜索工具广受 Poe 平台欢迎，它不仅经济高效，还能快速提供搜索结果，让在 Poe 上使用 Claude 模型变得更便捷。
Anthropic 的 Web 搜索一贯提供全面深入的结果，性能优于我们测试过的其他工具。
Claude 响应的深度和准确性，以及其作为研究代理的能力，将显著提升我们帮助客户构建 Web 应用的效率。
